text.title: Continuous Discovery Examples
text.summary: End-to-end worked example illustrating the methodology against a realistic input.

example.title: Onboarding-friction discovery cycle
example.note: Daily Haiku watchers flag step-3 funnel drop 38% (posthog) + 12 Intercom tickets clustered as 'I do not understand step 3' over a week. Two interviews (paid + free) confirm: user expects automation, sees a blank textbox. Synthesizer (Sonnet) tags JTBD + user-segment + frequency + severity. Bi-weekly Opus run aggregates 5 observations across 4 sources (>=5 / >=2 floor passes). Creates opportunity opp_step3_friction with score (freq=12, sev=4, addr=H). Assumption-tester designs a fake-door variant + smoke test; ships test; assumption 'users want a 1-click template' returns 'evidence found' (47% click). Monthly review writes a memo: doubled-down on opp_step3_friction; kill list includes opp_old_chart_redesign (no evidence in 6 weeks).
